exercises.name: Pendulum Squat
exercises.note:
First set 8
Second  6
3rd 6
Added a 4th set and got 5. 

I didn't want to push too hard here. I'm traveling tomorrow so I left probably two reps in reserve for each of these.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Same thing on hip thrusts. I didn't wanna give it 100%. Honestly I think my body's still a little tired from HIIT class on Saturday. My lower back is a little tight so I stayed at 180 lb and I got 12 all sets and stopped at the top plenty to activate the glutes.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: I got on set one, ten, set to 10, and set three. I did get twelve.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: I dropped the weight to 30 lb dumbbells because I just felt like that was going to be better. I got all controlled reps and still felt a lot of activation.

exercises.name: Core Circuit (Back-Safe)
exercises.planned: Cable Crunch 66 lb × 12 → Dead Bugs 8–10/side → Side Plank 30s/side · 2 rounds

notes: First session since lower body last Tuesday (June 23) — ~7 days off. Traveling, using Planet Fitness (different equipment than home gym). Came in under-fueled — hadn't had normal protein over the last 5 days. Suspects some machines run heavier here than home gym. Solid session overall given the layoff and low fuel.

exercises.name: Magnum Decline Bench Press (Hammer Strength)
exercises.planned: Travel substitute for chest press machine
exercises.weight: 60 lb/arm (45 lb plate/side + 15 lb starting resistance)
exercises.note: Set 1 regular grip 10. Set 2 switched to neutral grip 10. Set 3 10. Plate-loaded Hammer Strength decline press, stickers read 'Starting Resistance 15 lb' so ~60 lb per arm. Good substitute for the chest press machine while traveling.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.note: All reps. Last rep pretty tough but got them all. Held at 40.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: Started 130 (this gym's increments differ from home). Got 10, then 8 on set 2. Dropped to 120 for set 3 and got 10 — probably had 1+ more. Attributes the drop-off to 5 days of low protein + machine possibly running heavier here.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: Started 115 at this gym. 3x10, last rep tough. Different machine/increments than home.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Went up to 20 lb. Got all 3 sets of 15. Last rep very difficult but completed. Monitor left shoulder at this weight.

exercises.name: Incline DB Curl
exercises.note: Incline bench. 3x12 at 20 lb. Supersetted with skull crushers.

exercises.name: Skull Crusher (EZ-Bar)
exercises.note: 40 lb bar. Set 1 12, set 2 10. Only 2 sets. NOTE: this was OFF the home program due to upper back strain (overhead extension risk) — back must be feeling good. Flag if any tightness.

exercises.name: Core Circuit (2 rounds)
exercises.planned: Hanging knee raise / dead bugs / side plank
exercises.note: Hanging knee raises x10, dead bugs x20, 30-sec planks each side. 2 rounds.
